title: SimplifiedCraft
description: Make The Game Look How Microsoft Intended To.
body:
I'll come back to this one day.

Make The Game Look How Microsoft Intended To.

[Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) Is How Mojang Sees The Game ... But Microsoft ?

Current Changes :

- Crafting Table
- Dirt
- Dirt Path
- Grass
- Snow Grass
- Oak Log
- Oak Planks
- Snow
- Powder Snow
- Stone
- Every Type Of Sword , Pickaxe & Axe
- Stripped Oak Log
- Cobblestone
- Water Still & Flow
- Lava Still & Flow (Testing)
- Sand
- Red Sand

New ! :

- Oak Leaves
- Farmland
- Farmland Moist
- Birch log (Will Probably Be Changed)
- Birch Planks
- Birch Leaves

More Blocks & Items Coming Soon !
